Campus spaces

Facilities that support hands-on learning

Explore technology-enhanced rooms, student spaces, and everyday campus facilities designed for focused academic work and active student life.

Computer Laboratory

Modern computer laboratory

Room 103

Modern computer laboratory designed for hands-on programming, networking, multimedia, and technology-related activities.

Room 309

Modern computer laboratory designed for hands-on programming, networking, multimedia, and technology-related activities.

Room 310

Modern computer laboratory designed for hands-on programming, networking, multimedia, and technology-related activities.

Room 311

Modern computer laboratory designed for hands-on programming, networking, multimedia, and technology-related activities.

Student spaces

Campus support facilities

STI Library

Quiet study environment with updated learning resources and comfortable spaces for research.

Court

Multipurpose court for sports, student events, activities, and campus-wide gatherings.

Canteen

Student dining and social space for breaks, meals, and everyday campus conversations.

Classroom

Technology-enhanced learning rooms with projectors, air conditioning, and modern seating.
